raw: Each promo code provides up to two adults with $15 admission per person and four youths (ages 7–17) with $10 admission per person. Tickets to the MFA are always free for visitors under seven years old. Valid only for the date listed on this pass. This is a coupon pass that will be emailed and can be printed or displayed on your mobile screen.

source_phrases.max_adults: up to two adults with $15 admission per person
source_phrases.max_people: up to two adults...and four youths
source_phrases.free_under_age: always free for visitors under seven years old
